videos.title: What is Artificial Intelligence? And How Does It Work?
videos.description: An engaging and visually stunning introduction to artificial intelligence, explaining its basic definition, history, and the fundamental concept of how AI learns and makes decisions. A great starting point for beginners.

videos.title: What is Artificial Intelligence? (AI explained)
videos.description: This video from IBM provides a clear and concise overview of AI, defining what it is, exploring different types of AI (Narrow, General, Superintelligence), and showcasing real-world applications. Excellent for understanding the scope of AI.

videos.title: What is Machine Learning? (IBM Technology)
videos.description: Dive deeper into one of the core pillars of modern AI: Machine Learning. This video clearly explains what ML is, its different types (supervised, unsupervised, reinforcement learning), and how machines learn from data without explicit programming.

videos.title: What is Deep Learning? (IBM Technology)
videos.description: Building on machine learning, this video introduces deep learning, a powerful subset inspired by the human brain's neural networks. It explains the concept of artificial neural networks and how they enable AI to tackle complex problems like image recognition and natural language processing.

videos.title: MLOps Explained
videos.description: An excellent introductory video from Google Cloud that breaks down MLOps principles, covering CI/CD for ML, continuous training, and monitoring to ensure reliable deployment and management of AI models.

videos.title: Build and Deploy an AI Model as an API (Step-by-step tutorial)
videos.description: A practical, step-by-step tutorial demonstrating how to wrap a machine learning model into a deployable API using Flask, making it accessible for integration into applications and potential monetization.

videos.title: AI Business Models Explained: How to Monetize Your AI Project
videos.description: From DeepLearning.AI, this video covers various strategies for monetizing AI projects, including subscription models, API access, and integrating AI into existing services, providing a clear overview of common AI business models.

videos.title: Navigating the AI Product Lifecycle: From Idea to Impact
videos.description: This video explores the entire AI product lifecycle, from ideation to deployment and beyond, emphasizing key considerations for launching a successful AI product and ensuring its long-term impact and sustainability.

videos.title: How to Price Your AI Product
videos.description: A focused discussion on the unique challenges and strategies involved in pricing AI products and services, covering different pricing models and how to articulate value to customers.
